summary: Stress Testing Feature (Iteration 77) - All 15 backend tests PASS, Frontend fully functional. 10-part Stress Testing Engine verified: Load Testing (10k searches/hr, 1k bookings/hr), Queue Stress (5k jobs with autoscaling), Supplier Outage (failover for paximum/aviationstack/amadeus), Payment Failure (retry logic), Cache Failure (Redis degradation phases), Database Stress (query latency/index performance), Incident Response (supplier_outage/queue_overload), Tenant Safety (multi-tenant isolation), Performance Metrics (P95/error rate/queue depth/supplier availability), Report (readiness score 10/10, meets target). Frontend Stress Test tab renders 11 sub-panels with full API integration.
critical_code_review_comments: Load Testing correctly simulates 10k searches/hr and 1k bookings/hr with api_latency, supplier_latency, worker_throughput metrics
Queue Stress injects 5k jobs across 5 queues (booking, voucher, notification, incident, cleanup) with autoscaling tracking
Supplier Outage tests 3 suppliers (paximum, aviationstack, amadeus) with proper failover chains and circuit breaker implementation
Payment Failure handles 6 failure scenarios (timeout, gateway_error_502, insufficient_funds, card_declined, network_error, idempotency_conflict)
Cache Failure simulates 4 phases: normal → redis_disconnect → degraded → recovery with latency/throughput metrics
Database Stress tests 6 collections (bookings, hotels, agencies, payments, vouchers, customers) with write_test and aggregation_test
Incident Response covers supplier_outage (critical, 5min SLA) and queue_overload (high, 10min SLA) with full playbook steps
Tenant Safety tests 4 tenants (agency_alpha, beta, gamma, delta) with query isolation, write isolation, cross-access blocking
Performance Metrics provides real-time P95 latency, error rate, queue depth, and 3 supplier availability tracking
Stress Test Report calculates weighted readiness score (10/10) across 8 components with bottleneck identification

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Stress Test tab renders, all 11 sub-panels working, tests triggerable, results displayed)

seed_data_creation: None - stress tests generate simulated realistic metrics
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stress Testing fully implemented and tested. Readiness score 10/10 exceeds 9.5 target. All 14 API endpoints working (8 POST tests + 3 GET metrics/report/dashboard + 3 supplier outage variants). Frontend Stress Test tab has 11 sub-tabs: Overview, Load Test, Queue Stress, Supplier Outage, Payment Failure, Cache Failure, DB Stress, Incident Response, Tenant Safety, Metrics, Report. All tests show PASS verdict. Data uses SIMULATED VALUES (not real load testing) for testing purposes.

features_verified.Part1_Load_Testing: PASS - 10k searches/hr, 1k bookings/hr with api_latency (search_p95_ms, booking_p95_ms), supplier_latency (paximum, aviationstack, amadeus), worker_throughput
features_verified.Part2_Queue_Stress: PASS - 5k jobs, job_distribution across 5 queues, autoscaling (initial 3 → peak 8 workers), completion_rate_pct
features_verified.Part3_Supplier_Outage: PASS - All 3 suppliers tested (paximum→amadeus, aviationstack→paximum, amadeus→paximum) with circuit_breaker state=open
features_verified.Part4_Payment_Failure: PASS - 6 failure_scenarios, retry_recovery_rate_pct >85%, incidents_logged for retryable errors
features_verified.Part5_Cache_Failure: PASS - 4 phases (normal, redis_disconnect, degraded, recovery), latency_increase_factor tracked
features_verified.Part6_Database_Stress: PASS - 6 collections tested, write_test (500 concurrent), aggregation_test, summary with avg_query_latency_ms
features_verified.Part7_Incident_Response: PASS - supplier_outage (critical) and queue_overload (high) with 6 steps each, within_sla tracking
features_verified.Part8_Tenant_Safety: PASS - 4 tenants, 12 test_cases (query isolation, write isolation, cross-access blocking), zero_cross_tenant_leaks
features_verified.Part9_Performance_Metrics: PASS - p95_latency (search/booking), error_rate, queue_depth (5 queues), supplier_availability (3 suppliers)
features_verified.Part10_Stress_Test_Report: PASS - readiness_score 10/10, meets_target=true, 8 components, bottlenecks, capacity_limits, sla_compliance
features_verified.Dashboard_Combined: PASS - All metrics combined with recent_history and recommendation

components.incident_response: 10/10 (10% weight) - all steps PASS, within SLA

mocked_note: Stress test data uses SIMULATED VALUES with realistic metrics. Not actual load testing against production infrastructure.
